title: Floral Crunchy Uruguayan Potatoes Salad
description: A vibrant, fragrant salad of poached baby potatoes tossed with edible flowers, crisp herbs, and a citrusy vinaigrette, perfect for a showoff Uruguayan side.
instructions: Wash and scrub the baby potatoes; leave skins on for texture.
Gently poach the potatoes in lightly salted water for 8‑10 minutes, until just tender but still firm.
Drain and let cool slightly, then slice each potato in half lengthwise.
Whisk together olive oil, apple cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, lemon zest, lemon juice, and a pinch of sea salt to make the vinaigrette.
Toss the sliced potatoes in the vinaigrette until evenly coated.
Fold in fresh thyme, rosemary, and crushed edible flowers, stirring gently to keep the flowers intact.
Season with black pepper to taste and adjust salt if needed.
Serve immediately, garnished with a handful of microgreens if desired.
